name: InlineQueryResultVenue
description: Represents a venue. By default, the venue will be sent by the user. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the venue.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of the result, must be venue

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this result, 1-64 Bytes

fields.name: latitude
fields.description: Latitude of the venue location in degrees

fields.name: longitude
fields.description: Longitude of the venue location in degrees

fields.name: foursquare_id
fields.description: Foursquare identifier of the venue if known

fields.name: foursquare_type
fields.description: Foursquare type of the venue, if known. (For example, “arts_entertainment/default”, “arts_entertainment/aquarium” or “food/icecream”.)

fields.name: google_place_id
fields.description: Google Places identifier of the venue

fields.name: google_place_type
fields.description: Google Places type of the venue. (See supported types.)

fields.name: reply_markup
fields.description: Inline keyboard attached to the message

fields.name: input_message_content
fields.description: Content of the message to be sent instead of the venue

fields.name: thumbnail_url
fields.description: Url of the thumbnail for the result
